title: orobanche alba f. hellebori
intro: Orobanche alba f. hellebori, also known as Helleborin-rich White Broomrape, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a cardiac depressant and a vasodilator, due to the presence of helleborin and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Orobanche alba f. hellebori include its potential to reduce blood pressure, prevent cardiac arrhythmias, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. It is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion in herbal medicine, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
